caption: A woman with shoulder-length dark hair and glasses stands against a solid dark gray background. She wears a light green, embroidered tunic featuring a decorative neckline and a dark beaded necklace. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking and gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. In the initial moments, her right hand is raised toward her chest, moving outward as she speaks. As the scene progresses, she continues to gesture, with her right hand moving lower and then slightly back up. Her facial expressions shift from a neutral, focused look to one where she is actively speaking with her mouth open. A small circular logo containing the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of the frame. The background and her attire remain constant while her hand movements and facial expressions evolve.
